titleStmt.title: SII 15.40: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 40. (B.K. No. 83 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the south wall of the Nagarēśvara temple.

It states that when Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Daṇḍanāyaka Kēśimayya was governing Halasige Twelve-thousand, Hānuṁgal Five-hundred and Two Six-hundreds, Mahāsāmanta Bopparasa of the Sinda race and Kunnula family who was administering Muḷugunda Twelve, made a gift of land for the worship and offerings to the god Bhīmēśvara of the rājadhāni Muḷgunda and for the feeding of the ascetics. The gift was entrusted to Īśānaśakti-paṇḍita. It further records a gift of gold made to the same deity by Suṅkavergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Mēdimayya who was in charge of Muḷugunda Twelve and other areas. Bīra Māḷiseṭṭi who had the temple of the deity renovated, is also stated to have made a gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya na saṁbhaThe letterna is redundant.
vē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraparamabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēva
ra vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
. tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati �nāya
yaka kēsimayyaṁgaḷu halasige hanniccāsira hānuṁgalaynūṟu Eraḍaṟunūrumaṁ duThe letter ya is redundant.
ṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḻdarasuṁ gayyuttamira . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
mahāsāmaṁntaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ bhōgāvatīpuravarādhīśvaranudāramahēśvaraṁ pā
tāḷacakravartti sakaḷadigvaḷayaviḷasitakīrtti siṁda saujanyalatikākanda siṁdakuḷa kamaḷamā
rttaṇḍa sitagaragaṇḍa kunnulānvayaprasūtaṁ parijanapārijātaṁ vidagdhamugdhavāra sīmaṁtinī sī
maṁtaṁ viśamaturagārūḍhaprauḍharēvaṁta sāmantalalāṭapaṭṭa vairigōdhūmagharaṭṭaṁ satya
ratnākaraṁ ripunṟipabhayaṁkaraṁ rūpakaṁdarppaṁ vairijhaḷarppaṁ nāgadhvajavirājamānaṁ samasta jana saṁ
stūyamānaṁ dānavinōdaṁ mrigamadāmōda haracaraṇakamaḷabhriṁgaṁ sāhasatuṁga Ityādi nā
māvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ boppadēvarasaru muḷguṁda hanneraḍaṟa maṁneya sāmya
vanāḷdarasugeyyuttamirddu caturyyugada paṭṭaṇaṁ śrīmamadrājadhāni muḷguṁdada śrī bhīmēśvaradēva
ra snānapūje naivēdya yatibhōjanādigaḷācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantāgi tamma �vuṁḍa holado
ḷu mūvattāru gēṇa phaḷeyoḷu Ere yeraḍu mattarkkeyyaṁ [.] svasti yamaniya māsana prā
ṇāyāma pratyāhāra dhāraṇādhyānasamādhiguṇa saṁpannarappa śrīmadīsānaśakti paṇḍita
dēvara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svasti samastabhuvana saṁstūya māna brahmavaṁśāṁbara
dyumaṇi vidviṣṭajanacintāmaṇi mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka vibudhavaradāyaka manu municaritra
vairisasyalavitraṁ parastrīsahōdara vrikōdaraṁ haracaraṇakamaḷaṣaṭcaraṇaṁ duṣṭasaṁharaṇaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ
śaucagāṁgēyaṁ subhaṭamukhadarppaṇaṁ gōtrajanasaṁtarppaṇaṁ rūpamanōjaṁ haya vatsarājaṁ vidagdhamāni
nī mānabhaṁgaṁ guṇagaṇōttuṁgaṁ sāhasabhīmaṁ raṇaraṁgarāmaṁ saujanyaratnākaraṁ gaṁbhīraniśākaraṁ tyā
ga nāgārjjunaṁ śauryyasahasrārjjunaṁ pratāpādityaṁ vivēkasvīkrita sāhityaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ daṇḍanā
thadikkuṁjara patikāryyadhurandharaṁ niyōgayōdīśvara sukarakaviśukamākanda vidva jjanānanda mūrtimāṇikya nīti
cāṇakya nikhiḷadigvaḷayavarttikīrtti jagadānandamūrti Udāramahēśvara parākrama laṁkēśvara śaktitraya saṁpanna
nāśritajanaprasanna bhōgapuraṁdara sahajaguṇasundara Ityādi nāmāvaḷī virājitarapperaḍa ṟunūrara suṁkaverggaḍe
daṇḍanāyakaṁ mēdimayyaṁgaḷu muḷuguṁda hanneraḍādiyāgi halavu kaṁpaṇagaḷanāḍarasu geyyuttami
®du taḷada dīpāvaḷi mokke veṟeya śrī bhīmēśvaradēvara snānapūjādigaḷācaṁdārkka tāraṁ naḍevantāgi gadyāṇa Onda
biṭṭaru . Ī dharmmamaṁ seṭṭiguttaru mukhyavāgi taḷasamasta mummuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu nāda suṁkaverggaḍegaḷu pratipāḷi
si puṇyayuktarapparidanupēkṣisidaḍe pāpayuktarapparu . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraṁ (draḥ) . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta
vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭivariṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sontiyara māḷiseṭṭiya maga basavaseṭṭiyū maneya makkaḷu
bīra māḷiseṭṭiyaru bhīmēśvaradēvara dēgulamaṁ jīrṇnōddāramāḍisi vṛttiyaṁ haḍadu koṭṭaru . AiInūrvvara putra
Digital edition of SII 15.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
